data.title: BiomX Details Financial Stabilization and Strategic Repositioning Plans
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

BiomX ( (PHGE) ) has provided an update.

On March 13, 2026, BiomX amended a warrant originally issued in connection with a December 26, 2025 investment, cutting its term from five years to an expiration date of December 31, 2026 and halving the exercise price from $2.00 to $1.00 per share, while leaving the warrant share count unchanged. The company also updated the formula for cashless exercise to reference the lowest VWAP over the five trading days prior to exercise, a move management says is intended to reduce long-dated warrant overhang, simplify its capital structure, and support a stronger financial profile.

In a March 19, 2026 letter to shareholders, CEO Michael Oster framed the warrant amendment as part of a broader effort to stabilize BiomX’s finances, close high-cost operations such as its Maryland facility, and enforce tighter spending discipline. The company has stepped up engagement with investment banks and institutional investors and is evaluating strategic repositioning opportunities, including potential moves into advanced technology and defense-related markets, in a bid to enhance capital access and long-term value for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (PHGE) stock is a Hold with a $5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BiomX stock, see the PHGE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PHGE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PHGE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn, and negative equity) and dilution/restructuring risk from recent corporate actions. Technical indicators are moderately supportive and the earnings call shows clinical and regulatory progress, but short runway and program/regulatory setbacks limit upside.

To see Spark’s full report on PHGE stock, click here.

More about BiomX

BiomX Inc., listed on the NYSE American under the ticker PHGE, is undergoing a strategic and financial reset under a new leadership team with experience in financial markets, corporate strategy, and large public companies in the energy and defense sectors. The company is working to simplify its capital structure, reduce non-essential costs, and reposition its business focus toward sectors benefiting from strong global demand for advanced technologies, potentially including defense-related applications.

Average Trading Volume: 1,048,889

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.03M

See more insights into PHGE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zodiac Gold Extends Ben Ben Mineralization and Advances Drilling at Liberia’s Todi Project
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zodiac Gold Inc ( (TSE:ZAU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Zodiac Gold Inc. reported further trenching results from the Ben Ben target at its Todi Gold Project in Liberia, outlining a coherent near-surface gold mineralized zone. Recent work, including trench BBT005 with 32 metres at 0.56 g/t gold and earlier standout results of 30 metres at 1.24 g/t gold, has extended mineralization over 225 metres between trenches and 500 metres along a gold-in-soil anomaly tied to artisanal workings.

The company has now begun drilling beneath trench BBT002 as part of its ongoing program to test the continuity and geometry of the Ben Ben zone at depth. Zodiac Gold also detailed its sampling and QA/QC protocols, including independent assay work by ALS Geochemistry, underscoring an effort to build a robust technical foundation for an updated NI 43-101 report on Todi that could support the project’s advancement and sharpen its profile within West Africa’s junior gold exploration sector.

More about Zodiac Gold Inc

Zodiac Gold Inc. is a West African gold exploration company focused on advancing its flagship Todi Gold Project in Liberia. Listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and Frankfurt Stock Exchange, the company is targeting multiple priority gold anomalies along the Todi Shear Zone, including the Ben Ben prospect, with trenching and drilling programs aimed at defining mineralized zones for potential future development.

Average Trading Volume: 370,503

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$42.05M

Learn more about ZAU stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Tejon Ranch Proposes Shareholder Right to Call Meetings
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

An update from Tejon Ranch Company ( (TRC) ) is now available.

On March 19, 2026, Tejon Ranch Co. said its board had approved adding a proposal to the 2026 annual meeting agenda that would allow shareholders or groups holding at least 25% of outstanding shares to call a special shareholder meeting. The measure, which follows recent changes to board size and structure and a commitment made at the November 2025 Investor Day, is set for a vote at the May 13, 2026 meeting and underscores a tightening focus on shareholder rights and corporate governance.

If adopted, the special meeting right would give significant investors a new mechanism to address urgent issues between regular annual meetings, potentially increasing board accountability. The company plans to provide further details in its 2026 proxy statement, with the governance shift likely to be closely watched by shareholders interested in Tejon Ranch’s strategic direction and oversight framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (TRC) stock is a Hold with a $16.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tejon Ranch Company stock, see the TRC Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TRC is a Neutral.

Tejon Ranch Company’s overall stock score reflects a mix of financial challenges and positive earnings call sentiment. The financial performance is hindered by profitability and cash flow issues, while technical analysis shows mixed signals. Valuation concerns due to a high P/E ratio further impact the score. However, positive developments in farming and real estate leasing provide some optimism.

To see Spark’s full report on TRC stock, click here.

More about Tejon Ranch Company

Tejon Ranch Co., listed on the NYSE as TRC, is a diversified real estate development and agribusiness company. Its principal asset is a 270,000-acre landholding located roughly 60 miles north of Los Angeles and 30 miles south of Bakersfield, where it pursues a mix of commercial, industrial, residential, and agricultural projects.

data.description:

The latest update is out from Worksport ( (WKSP) ).

On March 19, 2026, Worksport Ltd. unveiled a new premium tonneau cover model to industry buyers at the Keystone BIG Show, positioning the product as a “game changer” for professional and commercial truck users. Presented to Keystone Automotive Operations’ large network of high-volume buyers, the unreleased cover is engineered to complement Worksport’s existing AL3, AL4, and HD3 lineup and is tailored to installer needs, dealer economics, and large-scale distribution.

The company reported strong early interest at the event, began building a pre-order pipeline, and plans a near-term commercial launch, with initial sales expected ahead of an early second-quarter rollout. This product expansion is a central plank of Worksport’s 2026 growth strategy to aggressively broaden its U.S. dealer network and builds on recent launches of its COR portable energy system and SOLIS solar tonneau cover, potentially enhancing its competitive standing in the automotive aftermarket and clean energy accessory markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (WKSP) stock is a Buy with a $11.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Worksport stock, see the WKSP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WKSP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WKSP is a Neutral.

Overall score is held back primarily by weak financial quality (losses and negative operating/free cash flow) and bearish technicals (below major moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by constructive earnings-call signals, including strong recent revenue growth, sharp gross-margin improvement, and a stated path toward cash-flow positivity.

To see Spark’s full report on WKSP stock, click here.

More about Worksport

Worksport Ltd., listed on Nasdaq as WKSP, designs and manufactures tonneau covers, solar integrations, portable power systems, and clean heating and cooling solutions for light trucks, overlanding, and global consumer goods markets. The U.S.-based company, which partners with Hyundai on its SOLIS solar cover, aims to tap growing demand for clean energy integrations, including mobile energy storage and cold-climate heat pump technologies.

Its in-house hard-folding cover line is compatible with all major truck models and is finding traction with newer truck makers, including those in the electric vehicle segment. Worksport is expanding its product portfolio and U.S. dealer network to strengthen its position in the automotive aftermarket and clean energy accessory space, targeting both consumer and professional truck markets.

data.title: Mount Logan Expands SOFIX via Yieldstreet Asset Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mount Logan Capital Inc ( (MLCI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 19, 2026, Mount Logan Capital said its Opportunistic Credit Interval Fund, SOFIX, agreed to acquire more than $100 million of assets and non-discharged liabilities from Yieldstreet Alternative Income Fund in a tax-free reorganization, nearly doubling SOFIX’s size and prompting an immediate suspension of new YS AIF share offerings while leaving its dividend reinvestment plan in place. Mount Logan expects the deal, supported by a two-year transition services agreement under which Willow Asset Management will provide access to YS AIF records for up to $5 million in cash, stock and fee rebates, to be immediately accretive to fee-related earnings and to improve SOFIX’s expense ratio, diversification and scale, reinforcing the firm’s strategy of growing permanent and semi-permanent capital vehicles.

The TSA between Mount Logan’s advisory unit and Willow grants SOFIX exclusive rights to use six years of YS AIF materials worldwide, with standard indemnities on both sides and termination rights if closing conditions are not met by December 31, 2026 or if regulators block the deal. Both funds’ boards have unanimously approved the asset acquisition, which is slated to close in late second or third quarter of 2026 subject to regulatory and YS AIF shareholder approval, positioning Mount Logan for a more than 30% uplift in trailing fee-related earnings and a stronger foothold in cash-flowing specialty finance and asset-backed credit.

The most recent analyst rating on (MLCI) stock is a Hold with a $8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mount Logan Capital Inc stock, see the MLCI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MLCI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MLCI is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by middling financial quality—strong top-line growth but weak profitability and softer cash flow—alongside neutral technicals. A very high dividend yield supports the valuation component, while forward-looking earnings-call guidance and recent capital actions are constructive but tempered by current losses and event-related risk.

To see Spark’s full report on MLCI stock, click here.

More about Mount Logan Capital Inc

Mount Logan Capital Inc. is an integrated alternative asset management and insurance solutions firm that focuses on generating durable, fee-based revenue and long-term value creation. Through Mount Logan Management LLC and Ability Insurance Company, it manages and invests across North American private and public credit markets while operating an insurance platform that provides long-duration liabilities to support its credit strategies, with more than $2.1 billion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025.

Average Trading Volume: 88,361

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.9M

See more data about MLCI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MDJM Faces Nasdaq Suspension After Sub-$0.10 Trading, Moves to OTC as It Seeks Hearing
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from MDJM ( (UOKA) ).

On March 19, 2026, MDJM LTD disclosed that it received a Nasdaq staff determination letter on March 13, 2026, stating its shares would be suspended from the exchange as of the market open on March 20 after the stock traded at or below $0.10 for 10 consecutive business days, triggering Nasdaq’s low-price and prior reverse-split rules. The company, already under a one-year discretionary panel monitor following a November 19, 2025 decision, plans to request a hearing before an independent Nasdaq Hearings Panel while its shares migrate to trading on OTC Markets under ticker UOKA, and it has undertaken a new reverse stock split effective March 16, 2026 as part of efforts to regain listing compliance, leaving investors facing heightened uncertainty about the outcome and future of its Nasdaq listing.

The potential suspension and shift to OTC trading may reduce liquidity and visibility for MDJM’s shareholders even as the company pursues strategic cultural projects and international expansion in the U.K. and Europe. The outcome of the upcoming hearing and the effectiveness of its recent capital measures, including the March 16 reverse split, will be critical in determining whether MDJM can restore full Nasdaq listing status and sustain investor confidence.

More about MDJM

MDJM LTD is a global culture innovation company focused on developing cultural intellectual property, animation production, international licensing, and operating cultural venues. The company is expanding in the U.K. by remodeling properties such as Fernie Castle in Scotland and the Robin Hill Property in England into multi-functional venues that combine fine dining, hospitality, art exhibitions, and cultural exchange events while collaborating with European studios on animated works blending Eastern and Western aesthetics.

Average Trading Volume: 18,066,779

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.8M

See more data about UOKA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Arctic Bioscience Study Strengthens Case for Psoriasis Drug HRO350
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Arctic Bioscience AS ( (DE:9TD) ) has provided an update.

Arctic Bioscience has reported that new research on herring roe oil and its phospholipid esters has been accepted for publication in the Journal of Lipid Research, underscoring the scientific basis of its marine-derived technologies. The peer-reviewed study shows that these compounds increase production of specialized pro-resolving mediators in human immune and skin cell models relevant to psoriasis, indicating a mechanism by which the company’s investigational drug HRO350 may help resolve inflammation.

Company executives say the data provide important mechanistic insight into how HRO350 could act in psoriasis and other immune-mediated diseases, reinforcing the rationale for its clinical development as a potential oral option for mild-to-moderate psoriasis patients seeking safer, better-tolerated therapies. The research, conducted with UK and Norwegian partners and partially grant-funded, strengthens Arctic Bioscience’s positioning in inflammation-targeted dermatology and supports continued investment in its R&D pipeline.

More about Arctic Bioscience AS

Arctic Bioscience is a biotech company focused on developing and commercializing pharmaceutical and nutraceutical products derived from bioactive marine compounds, particularly herring roe oil. Its lead drug candidate, HRO350, is an oral treatment in development for patients with mild-to-moderate psoriasis, while its nutraceutical offerings are sold globally as bulk ingredients and finished products under the ROMEGA brand.

Average Trading Volume: 16,099

Current Market Cap: NOK91.11M

Find detailed analytics on 9TD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Sylogist reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $14.4 million, with recurring revenue making up 81% of the total and SaaS annual recurring revenue rising 9% year over year to $33.8 million. Despite a gross margin of 56% and adjusted EBITDA of $1.0 million, the company posted a quarterly net loss of $0.9 million as it continues shifting away from project-based services.

For the full fiscal year 2025, Sylogist generated $62.2 million in revenue, with recurring revenue at 72% of the total, a gross margin of 58%, adjusted EBITDA of $9.1 million, and a net loss of $4.7 million. Management highlighted that the marked decline in project services revenue reflects a strategic transition to partner-led implementations and a broader transformation toward a higher-margin SaaS model, supported by recent board changes aimed at strengthening governance and long-term growth execution.

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Units Launch SHIAC Arbitrations Tied to Divested International Business
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) is now available.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company has initiated arbitration proceedings through three subsidiaries at the Shanghai International Economic and Trade Arbitration Commission against entities connected to its divested international business. The actions follow earlier investigation findings and seek declarations that certain entrusted manufacturing and trademark licence arrangements are ineffective, alongside claims for the return of goods, deposits, fund occupation fees and damages totaling about RMB75.6 million.

The arbitrations, involving Greatview Shandong, Greatview Beijing and Greatview Holdings, target Wintipak units that had been counterparties under the restructuring-related contracts. SHIAC accepted the cases on 18 March 2026, and the company cautioned that outcomes and potential effects on its financial position and results remain uncertain, leaving investors and other stakeholders awaiting further updates as the disputes progress.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated supplier in the aseptic packaging industry, focusing on packaging materials and related services for liquid food and beverage producers. The company operates through mainland Chinese subsidiaries and has previously maintained an international business that was restructured and disposed of, leaving ongoing contractual and trademark relationships with entities linked to that divested arm.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

data.title: Aveanna Healthcare Posts Strong Q4, Affirms 2026 Outlook
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Aveanna Healthcare Holdings ( (AVAH) ) is now available.

Aveanna Healthcare reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on March 19, 2026, with Q4 revenue rising 27.4% year over year to $662.5 million and net income jumping to $178.8 million, while adjusted EBITDA grew 54.0% to $85.0 million. For the full year ended January 3, 2026, revenue increased 20.2% to $2.43 billion, net income swung to a $225.0 million profit from a prior-year loss, and adjusted EBITDA surged 74.8% to $320.9 million, driven largely by growth in its private duty services segment.

The company maintained its 2026 guidance for revenue between $2.54 billion and $2.56 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $318 million to $322 million, signaling confidence in its core operations despite not yet factoring in its pending acquisition of Family First Homecare. Aveanna also highlighted solid liquidity and $131.0 million in free cash flow for 2025, although management noted that financing the Family First deal with cash and securitization borrowings is expected to reduce liquidity, underscoring an aggressive yet balance-sheet-conscious expansion strategy in pediatric home care.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVAH) stock is a Hold with a $8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aveanna Healthcare Holdings stock, see the AVAH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AVAH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AVAH is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects weak financial foundation (high leverage and low profitability) and only modest technical momentum, partially offset by strong recent operating performance, raised guidance, and a mid-range valuation.

To see Spark’s full report on AVAH stock, click here.

More about Aveanna Healthcare Holdings

Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc., based in Atlanta and listed on Nasdaq, operates a diversified home care platform focused on medically complex, high-cost patient populations. The company delivers care primarily in the home across three operating divisions, including private duty services, home health and hospice, and medical solutions, and has been executing a multi-year strategic transformation with an acquisition-led growth strategy.

Aveanna’s model centers on high-quality, cost-effective in-home clinical care, positioning it within the pediatric and complex-care segment of the broader U.S. home care industry. Recent integrations, such as Thrive Skilled Pediatric Care, and expansion into multi-state pediatric home nursing reflect its emphasis on scaled, specialized services for vulnerable patient groups.

Average Trading Volume: 1,126,587

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.44B
